text: Restaurant / Menu Page "Build a restaurant website with a dark background, red accent color, hero with restaurant name, menu section with categories and items with prices, about section, and reservation CTA"

The `@/` alias resolves to `./src` — all imports are correct.

✓ Task 12 — No additional dependencies needed (lucide-react is already installed, all features use existing packages)

---

✅ **All tasks complete!**

---

**Pages built:**
- `Index` — Full single-page restaurant experience

**Components created:**
- `Navbar` — Sticky navigation with smooth-scroll links, transparent → opaque on scroll, mobile hamburger menu
- `Hero` — Full-viewport hero with layered overlays, restaurant name, animated tagline, dual CTAs, and scroll indicator
- `MenuItemCard` — Dish card with image, badge, name, description, and price with hover effects
- `MenuSection` — Category tab switcher (Starters, Main Course, Sides, Desserts, Cocktails) with animated item grid
- `AboutSection` — Two-column story layout with chef photo, pull quote, stats, and three philosophy pillars
- `ReservationSection` — Fully functional reservation form with validation, success state, info sidebar, and private dining callout
- `Footer` — Full footer with brand, navigation, contact/hours, social icons, and legal links

**Data:**
- `src/data/menuData.ts` — 22 realistic menu items across 5 categories with names, descriptions, prices, and badges

**Design system:**
- Dark charcoal/near-black background (`hsl(0 0% 7%)`)
- Crimson red accent (`hsl(0 82% 48%)`) for CTAs, prices, and highlights
- Aged gold (`hsl(38 70% 52%)`) for ornamental details and labels
- Playfair Display (editorial serif) + Lato (clean body font)
- Smooth CSS fade-in-up animations on all sections
